hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
payload = json.load(sys.stdin)
output = payload.get('output', '')
lines = output.splitlines()
MAX = 100
if len(lines) > MAX:
    kept = lines[-MAX:]
    header = f'[truncated {len(lines) - MAX} lines]'
    payload['output'] = header + '\n' + '\n'.join(kept)
print(json.dumps(payload))
"
echo 'Available skills: [using-superpowers, <any others>]. Invoke via the Skill tool when needed. Do not load skill bodies proactively.'
